Vamsi Food Products

Pure. Fresh.
Close to home.

Traditionally made, hygiene-packed, and delivered with care. All prices on request — contact us for bulk or retail orders.

Appalam

Crispy sun-dried papad made from urad dal — perfect with rice or as a snack.

Vamsi Financial Associates
Vamsi Financial Associates

Your home,
made reachable.

We partner with leading banks and NBFCs to find the loan that fits your situation — not just your paperwork. We walk with you from the first question to the final signature.

  • Tie ups with LIC HFL, HDFC, IOB, Sundaram Finance & Sriram Finance
  • Home purchase, construction & top-up loans
  • Mortgage loans
  • Document checklist & application assistance
  • Balance transfer & interest rate negotiation
Check Your Eligibility
☀️
Vamsi Traders
Solar Consultation

Power your home.
Cut your bill.

Going solar is one of the smartest long-term decisions for any Tamil Nadu homeowner. We handle the entire consultation — so you get the right system at the right price.

  • Rooftop capacity assessment (residential & commercial)
  • PM Surya Ghar & TANGEDCO subsidy guidance
  • ROI & payback period calculation
  • Vetted installer referrals & quote comparison
  • Net metering application support
Book a Free Consultation
